So why Taki eight C?

This initiative directly aligns

Our regional lead engagement, we are from the community.

We support Iwi, hapu,

source_metadata.title: 2025/10/15 - MA
source_metadata.description:
Wednesday 15 October 2025 | Māori Affairs Committee    

Briefing on Te Tautuhi-o-Rongo (Māori Macro Policy Framework)

Hearing of evidence 
Submitter List:
Te Puni Kōkiri

Melissa Ross, Deputy Secretary, Strategy (Acting)
Grace Smith, Deputy Secretary Regions
Paula Rawiri, Deputy Secretary, Policy
Karen McGuiness, General Manager, Investments
Bernard (Bern) Te Paa, General Manager, Wellbeing, Policy
Joanne (Jo) Tuapawa, General Manager, Strategy
Kelsey Jones, Regional Director, Waikato-Waiariki (acting)
Debra Anderson, Manager, Organisational Performance
Kylie Hood, Principal Advisor, Investments
